body.title: CLOSED: Add palace_ls/read/write/search MCP tools to Librarian
body.result: palace_ls/read/write/search added to Librarian tools; 22 tests pass
body.description:
Add 4 MCP tools to agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/tools/palace_tools.py: palace_ls(prefix, limit) — indented tree listing; palace_read(path) — full node content; palace_write(path, title, content, node_type, tags) — upsert; palace_search(query, tags, limit) — GIN full-text + tag filter. Wire into tools/__init__.py SCHEMAS + dispatch. All hit adc.palace via psycopg2.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/tools/palace_tools.py (new), agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/tools/__init__.py
**Design rules:** palace DB always; no SQLite; palace_write uses ON CONFLICT upsert
**Scope boundary:** IN: 4 palace tools wired into Librarian MCP. OUT: CLI script (T-palace-cli), palace_delete (add later), auth/multi-user.
**Test plan:** palace_ls returns indented tree for known prefix; palace_read returns full content; palace_write upserts and palace_read confirms; palace_search returns matches via GIN index.
